en-US.title: AdvisorAI
en-US.subtitle: Your PRU BSQ Advisor App
en-US.description:
AdvisorAI connects clients with their PRU BSQ financial advisor. Complete assessments, review results, and stay in touch — all in one place.

Features:
• Run financial assessments directly in-app
• Results routed automatically to your advisor's dashboard
• Secure Google Sheets integration for lead tracking
• Dark-themed, minimal interface built for advisors
